content.title: Vue.js CRM Contact Management Frontend
content.short_description: This is a Vue. js 3 single-page application that provides a user interface for managing CRM contacts
content.description: This is a Vue.js 3 single-page application that provides a user interface for managing CRM contacts. The application features a contact creation form with real-time validation and integrates with a backend API to submit contact data to HubSpot's CRM system. It demonstrates modern frontend development with Vue Router and responsive design principles.
content.role: I developed a Vue.js 3 SPA using Vite as the build tool, implementing a contact form component with comprehensive validation. I created proper routing structure with Vue Router and established API communication using Axios. I also developed an alternative vanilla JavaScript HTML version to demonstrate multiple frontend approaches for the same functionality.

achievements: Created a modern, reactive user interface for contact management
Implemented real-time form validation with user-friendly error messages
Established clean component architecture for scalability
Provided multiple frontend implementation options for flexibility
